div.h1: HTTP/1.1 Request Wire Format — Annotated Byte Map
div.p: Complete buffer layout · CRLF vs LF variants · End-of-headers boundary

g.text:
0x54 | 1 byte | LF → '
' (0x0A) ← forms 

 with prev line
Empty line: 2 bytes at 0x53–0x54 | Total header block: 85 bytes
Body [byte 0x55 … ] — GET has no body; 0 bytes follow
body_len = 0 · req->body pointer set to 0x55 (past empty line)
Bare-LF Encoding — same semantics, 1 byte shorter per line
Request line: 26 bytes (1 fewer than CRLF variant)
0x29 | 1 byte | LF ONLY → '\n' (0x0A) — strip trailing \r if absent
Parser scans for \n, strips optional leading \r from prev line
Empty line = 1 byte | Savings: N bytes vs CRLF (N = header count + 1)
Rule 1 | scan for \n with memchr() — finds both CRLF and bare LF
Rule 2 | after memchr(\n): if line[line_len-1]=='\r' then line_len--
Rule 3 | empty-line detect: line_len==0 after \r strip → end of headers
Rule 4 | NEVER use strchr() — may read past valid buffer region
Result: identical http_request_t produced for both Variant A and B
byte N-3 | 0x0D | CR — final char of last header value line
byte N-2 | 0x0A | LF — completes last header's CRLF
byte N-1 | 0x0D | CR — start of empty line
byte N | 0x0A | LF — completes empty line → BOUNDARY
req->body = body_start (points into raw buf — zero copy)
buf must outlive http_request_t — both on same stack frame
nginx default | 8 KB per header buffer (client_header_buffer_size)
Typical request | 300–800 bytes for common GET with 5–10 headers
Worst case legal | ~4 KB (many large cookie headers)
Our limit | 8 191 bytes payload + 1 null terminator
0x?? | SP 'a folded val' | continuation — starts with 0x20 or 0x09
RFC 7230 deprecated obs-fold — real clients still send it
action | append ' ' + ltrimmed(continuation) to prev header value
result | single value string with internal space replacing fold
Must check header_count > 0 before accessing prev — no orphan fold
RFC 7230 S3.2: header field names are case-insensitive
cost = 32 x strcmp() ≈ few hundred ns
all 32 entries fit in L1 cache (32 x 1152 B = 36 KB → L2)
Hash map warranted only when N > 64 or lookup is hot inner loop
